prompt: A close-up vertical selfie portrait of a dark yami-kawaii idol girl in a cramped neon-pink room, shot with her arm extended toward the camera so one glittery sleeve and hand blur large in the foreground. She wears a highly detailed black-and-hot-pink plaid stage outfit with glossy vinyl straps, lace trim, ribbons, buckles, and layered accessories: a sleeveless bodice, black fishnet detached sleeves, multiple black armbands on one upper arm, pink bows, and a heart-shaped chest badge that reads "病みかわいい". Her hair is dark brown, styled in a high bun with long straight sections framing the sides, decorated with a large ribbon. Her visible hand is posed near her lips in a coy idol gesture, wearing a frilly pink lace fingerless glove, long decorated nails, and chunky rings. Add a pink armband on the upper arm with handwritten Japanese text, and subtle earrings. The face is intentionally hidden by a large centered rectangular censor blur covering most of the face from forehead to chin. The background is dense and grungy, filled with black-and-pink graffiti, plastic curtains, plush toys, and distressed decor. Include exactly 4 visible Japanese text elements in the scene: graffiti on the left reading "闇ー?", graffiti below it reading "嫌いにならないで", graffiti further down reading "私だけ見ててね", and a glowing heart-shaped neon sign on the upper right reading "病みしか勝たん". Place 2 plush figures in the background: one pale pink stuffed animal on the left and one black plush with X eyes on the right. Lighting is moody club-style magenta and violet with glossy highlights, giving a chaotic underground idol dressing-room vibe. Ultra-detailed, flashy textures, glitter, lace, vinyl, messy cute-goth atmosphere, high contrast, smartphone selfie composition, portrait orientation.
